column1: # History:
#   2026-05-02 commit 2415b0b: routed Phase 3/4/5 to Groq; first live run hit median=9.
#                              Diagnosed: ingestAnswer wrote to workingMemory.intakeAnswers[]
#                              only — never extracted into spec.personas / scenarios / nonGoals —
#                              so deriveCandidateUnknowns re-emitted the same gaps every turn
#                              until MAX_INTAKE_STEPS hit.
#   2026-05-02 fix(intake) 6166fb0: ingestAnswer now promotes answers into intakeSpec /
#                              stanceBecauseClauses based on metadata.extracts_into.spec_path
#                              or metadata.topic
column2: with a method-based fallback. nextStep merges

column1: #                              the in-progress slices into the freshly-hydrated spec via
#                              effectiveSpecFor() before scoring. Median moved 9 → 7.
#   2026-05-02 prompt-only attempt (reverted): tried tightening the JTBD prompt to enumerate
#                              slots and reject same-slot re-asks. Landed no-op at median=7
#                              because the 8B Groq model's slot-judgment was unstable across
#                              archetypes; pp-09 dropped 9→7 but pp-02 / pp-04 regressed when
#                              the model picked slots whose answers the fixture's discovery
#                              script didn't carry. Reverted at 62f027a.
#   2026-05-02 fix(intake) 9c3b84a: controller-side JTBD slot-dedup. The controller now
#                              tracks workingMemory.askedJtbdSlots[] across turns and prunes
#                              candidates that map to an already-asked JTBD slot before they
#                              ever reach the scorer. Slot enumeration: persona
#                              exclusions
#                              mapping with spec_path fallback. Non-JTBD methods (qfd
#                              are unaffected. Median moved 7 → 5; range 0–7 (was 2–9).
#                              8/9 fixtures improved or held; pp-08 regressed 4→6 because
#                              rule-4 free-form follow-ups don't carry a clean topic and the
#                              spec_path mapping is broader
column2: so the dedup couldn't see them.

column1: #   2026-05-03 refactor(prompts) THIS RUN: jtbd rule-4 slot-aware follow-ups. Three changes:
#                              (1) shared/prompts/methods/jtbd.ts rev 2 → 3: every output now
#                                  carries `topic` from the 7-slot enum (persona
#                                  exclusions
#                                  matching extracts_into.spec_path. Rule-4 is no longer
#                                  free-form; it must pick a slot from the SLOT TABLE. Worked
#                                  example added showing the pattern. Score 22→23/25
#                                  (Constraints 4→5).
#                              (2) intake-controller.ts jtbdSlotForCandidate: additive entries
#                                  for the 7 slot-ID topics so the route layer / eval can
#                                  forward question.topic into ingestAnswer and the slot ledger
#                                  reflects what was asked
#                              (3) intake-controller.ts nextStep: post-generation slot dedup —
#                                  if the JTBD prompt's emitted question maps to a slot already
#                                  in askedJtbdSlots (via topic OR spec_path fallback)
#                                  through to INFER instead of asking. This catches `jobs` and
#                                  any other slot whose discovery candidate was pruned but
#                                  whose rule-4 follow-up still re-emitted. The eval and the
#                                  React intake component both forward question.topic into
#                                  metadata so the live route gets the same dedup.
#                              Median moved 5 → 4; pp-08 moved 6 → 0 with 4 INFERs. Across 12
#                              runs the pp-08 distribution narrowed from {1
#                              to {0
#                              variance comes from the Groq 8B model's instability on 1-shot
#                              prompt obedience
